utterance: How many shots did Jayson Tatum take?
gold_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM shot_charts WHERE player_id = (SELECT player_id FROM players WHERE name ILIKE '%Jayson Tatum%')
notes: Player subquery via ILIKE for fuzzy name match. Verified: 1426 shots. player_id = 1628369.

gold_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM shot_charts WHERE player_id = (SELECT player_id FROM players WHERE name ILIKE '%Jayson Tatum%') AND made_flag = 1
notes: Turn 2: carries forward Tatum subquery; adds made_flag = 1. 'He' resolved to Tatum from Turn 1.

utterance: How many shots did Jaylen Brown take?
gold_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM shot_charts WHERE player_id = (SELECT player_id FROM players WHERE name ILIKE '%Jaylen Brown%')
notes: Separate query for Jaylen Brown. player_id = 1627759. Verified: 1256 shots. Distinct from 'Brown' ambiguity — ILIKE '%Jaylen Brown%' disambiguates.

gold_sql: SELECT p.name, COUNT(*) as attempts FROM shot_charts sc JOIN players p ON sc.player_id = p.player_id WHERE p.name ILIKE '%Jaylen Brown%' OR p.name ILIKE '%Jayson Tatum%' GROUP BY p.name
notes: Turn 2: 'his' resolved to Jaylen Brown from Turn 1; Tatum from prior context. Two-player comparison via OR filter + GROUP BY.

utterance: Who took the most shots on the team?
gold_sql: SELECT p.name, COUNT(*) as attempts FROM shot_charts sc JOIN players p ON sc.player_id = p.player_id GROUP BY p.name ORDER BY attempts DESC LIMIT 1
notes: No filter — aggregate over all players in shot_charts. ORDER BY DESC LIMIT 1 returns top shooter. Verified: Jayson Tatum (1426).

utterance: Show me the top 5 shooters by attempts.
gold_sql: SELECT p.name, COUNT(*) as attempts FROM shot_charts sc JOIN players p ON sc.player_id = p.player_id GROUP BY p.name ORDER BY attempts DESC LIMIT 5
notes: Turn 2: same aggregation; swaps LIMIT 1 to LIMIT 5. Verified top 5: Tatum, J.Brown, White, Porzingis, Holiday.

utterance: How many shots did Derrick White take?
gold_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM shot_charts WHERE player_id = (SELECT player_id FROM players WHERE name ILIKE '%Derrick White%')
notes: player_id = 1628401. Verified: 839 shots. 'Derrick White' — full name used to avoid ambiguity with other Whites in players table.

utterance: What was his field goal percentage?
gold_sql: SELECT CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN made_flag = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS FLOAT) / COUNT(*) as fg_pct FROM shot_charts WHERE player_id = (SELECT player_id FROM players WHERE name ILIKE '%Derrick White%')
notes: Turn 2: 'his' resolved to Derrick White from Turn 1. FG% = made / attempted as FLOAT.

utterance: How many shots did Jrue Holiday take from 3?
gold_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM shot_charts WHERE player_id = (SELECT player_id FROM players WHERE name ILIKE '%Jrue Holiday%') AND shot_type = '3PT Field Goal'
notes: player_id = 201950. Compound filter: player + shot_type. '3' maps to shot_type = '3PT Field Goal'.

gold_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM shot_charts WHERE player_id = (SELECT player_id FROM players WHERE name ILIKE '%Al Horford%') AND shot_type = '3PT Field Goal'
notes: Turn 2: swaps player from Jrue Holiday to Al Horford; carries forward 3PT filter. player_id = 201143.

utterance: Who had the best shooting percentage among players with at least 100 attempts?
gold_sql: SELECT p.name, CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN sc.made_flag = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS FLOAT) / COUNT(*) as fg_pct FROM shot_charts sc JOIN players p ON sc.player_id = p.player_id GROUP BY p.name HAVING COUNT(*) >= 100 ORDER BY fg_pct DESC LIMIT 1
notes: HAVING clause filters minimum attempt threshold before ranking. Best FG% among qualified players.

utterance: Show all players with more than 500 attempts.
gold_sql: SELECT p.name, COUNT(*) as attempts FROM shot_charts sc JOIN players p ON sc.player_id = p.player_id GROUP BY p.name HAVING COUNT(*) > 500 ORDER BY attempts DESC
notes: HAVING COUNT(*) > 500. Verified: Tatum (1426), J.Brown (1256), White (839), Porzingis (752), Holiday (689), Pritchard (635), Hauser (558) qualify.

utterance: How many shots did Payton Pritchard take from beyond the arc?
gold_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM shot_charts sc JOIN players p ON sc.player_id = p.player_id WHERE p.name ILIKE '%Payton Pritchard%' AND sc.shot_type = '3PT Field Goal'
notes: 'beyond the arc' maps to shot_type = '3PT Field Goal'. Player join for readability; could also use subquery.

gold_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM shot_charts sc JOIN players p ON sc.player_id = p.player_id WHERE p.name ILIKE '%Payton Pritchard%' AND sc.shot_type = '3PT Field Goal' AND sc.made_flag = 1
notes: Turn 2: carries forward Pritchard + 3PT from Turn 1; adds made_flag = 1.

utterance: Which player took the most shots in the paint?
gold_sql: SELECT p.name, COUNT(*) as paint_attempts FROM shot_charts sc JOIN players p ON sc.player_id = p.player_id WHERE ABS(sc.x) <= 80 AND sc.y <= 190 GROUP BY p.name ORDER BY paint_attempts DESC LIMIT 1
notes: Combines player aggregation with paint zone filter. In-the-paint: ABS(x) <= 80 AND y <= 190.

gold_sql: SELECT p.name, COUNT(*) as paint_attempts FROM shot_charts sc JOIN players p ON sc.player_id = p.player_id WHERE ABS(sc.x) <= 80 AND sc.y <= 190 GROUP BY p.name ORDER BY paint_attempts DESC LIMIT 3
notes: Turn 2: same paint zone + player grouping; swaps LIMIT 1 to LIMIT 3.

utterance: How many shots did Marcus Smart take?
gold_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM shot_charts WHERE player_id = (SELECT player_id FROM players WHERE name ILIKE '%Marcus Smart%')
notes: player_id = 203935. Returns 0 — Marcus Smart was traded to Memphis before the 2023-24 season started. Intentional edge case: SQL is correct; 0 is the valid answer. Useful for testing system handles empty results gracefully.

gold_sql: SELECT shot_type, COUNT(*) as attempts FROM shot_charts WHERE player_id = (SELECT player_id FROM players WHERE name ILIKE '%Marcus Smart%') GROUP BY shot_type
notes: Turn 2: 'he' resolved to Marcus Smart from Turn 1. Returns empty — same 0-shot reason. Edge case: system should surface 'no data found for Marcus Smart in 2023-24' as a clarification, not a SQL error.
